description: The Dash messenger bag from belkin is a perfect laptop bag for those professionals who are constantly on the move. In a briefcase pattern and with loads of organiser space, this bag offers 360 degree access to all your gear when on the go. Laptop size: 16" Bag exterior: 17.5"x13"x5" Laptop compartment: 15.2"x10.9"x1.7" Made of nylon and waxed canvas for waterproofing Dog tag buckles to hole the upper flap in place One zippered and one velcro closure pouch on the flap Padded laptop compartment with an expandable storage space A zippered pouch in the front Zippered and expandable water bottle holder on the side Zippered compartment on trolley pass through flap Removable and adjustable shoulder strap with a padded holder Haul loop for handling ease Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
